security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: A privacy-first WhatsApp Web desktop client
bundle.longDescription: ZeroWhats is a minimalist, privacy-first WhatsApp Web desktop client for Linux, macOS, and Windows: native notifications, an app-lock with auto-lock, a tray unread counter, and no telemetry.
